name: Perfumed Pampering
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: [AttackerName] giggles sweetly as she parts from [TargetName]'s lips to pepper [TargetHisOrHer] face with doting smooches while rubbing her plush bust against [TargetHisOrHer] chest, letting out breathy coos into [TargetHisOrHer] ears while her sweet pheromone-laced fragrance permeates his nose, capturing every one of [TargetName]'s increasingly dazed senses.
miss: [AttackerName] giggles sweetly as she parts from [TargetName]'s lips to pepper [TargetHisOrHer] face with doting smooches while rubbing her plush bust against [TargetHisOrHer] chest, but [TargetName] manages to resist the seductive pampering!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] becomes giddy and high off [AttackerName]' sweet parade of gentle attentions, warm kiss marks, and enthrallingly sweet scent, feeling ever dizzier with aphrodisiac-laced euphoria...
